A human hand reaches slowly toward a green cube placed on a white table covered with a black grid pattern. The hand begins extended above the table with fingers slightly curled. It then lowers slowly toward the green cube and gently grasps it using the thumb and index finger. The cube is lifted slowly from the table surface without any bouncing or sliding. Once lifted the hand remains motionless holding the cube steady above the table. The cube is now held firmly in the hand and does not move further. The hand stays still in this position after lifting the cube. The entire human hand must remain fully visible in the frame at all times, with no cropping, no fingers cut off, and no part of the hand outside the camera view. The camera must remain completely static with no movement, no panning, no tilting, no zooming, and no change in viewpoint during the entire video. No extra or unnecessary motions are allowed, the hand must not perform any additional gestures such as turning to show the palm, posing, rotating unnecessarily. All other objects in the scene that are not being manipulated must remain completely stationary, with no position shift, no rotation, and no change in placement throughout the entire video.
